creator: kai@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Kubilay Kocak from comment #1)

QA looks fine. I have also successfully tested net-mgmt/netbox for runtime without problems:

> Port                            Source          Remark
> databases/py-fakeredis          <3.6.0          setup.py
> devel/py-cachecontrol           >=2.10.5        setup.py
> devel/py-cachy                  >=3.3.6,<4.0.0  setup.py
> devel/py-dj22-django-rq         >=3             setup.py
> devel/py-django-rq              >=3             setup.py
> devel/py-rq                     >=3.0.0         setup.py
> devel/py-taskflow               >=2.10.0        test-requirements.txt
> graphics/py-sorl-thumbnail      N/A             Noted only as "redis" in README and tox.ini
> net-mgmt/netbox                 ==3.3.11        requirements.txt (not used during installation / runtime)
> net/py-kombu                    >=3.3.11        Noted in extra/requirements/extras/redis.txt
> www/py-dj22-django-cacheops     >=2.9.1         setup.py        
> www/py-dj22-django-redis        >=2.10.0        setup.py
> www/py-django-cacheops          >=2.9.1         setup.py
> www/py-django-constance         N/A             Noted as "redis" in setup.py 
> www/py-django-redis             >=2.10.0        setup.py
> www/py-horizon                  N/A             Noted in doc/source/admin/sessions.rst
